title: helianthemum chamaecistus var. hirsutum
intro: Helianthemum chamaecistus var. hirsutum, also known as hairy rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the rockrose family, Cistaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of hairy rockrose include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions. Hairy rockrose is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
